Terms of Service

ColorDevKit

Last updated: April 10, 2026

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using ColorDevKit, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

Use of the Service

ColorDevKit is provided as a free tool to help users convert color values and copy developer-ready color formats. You agree to use the site only for lawful purposes.

Availability

The service is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. The site owner may update, modify, suspend, or discontinue the tool at any time without notice.

No Warranty

While reasonable efforts are made to keep the tool accurate and available, no warranties are made regarding correctness, reliability, uptime, or fitness for a particular purpose.

Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, the site owner will not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of or inability to use the service.

Third-Party Services

The site may use third-party hosting, analytics, advertising, or related services. Those services may operate under their own terms and privacy policies.

Intellectual Property

The site design, branding, and original content of Color Code Converter remain the property of the site owner unless otherwise stated.

Changes to These Terms

These Terms of Service may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes are posted means you accept the revised terms.

Contact

If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact the site owner through the channel where this site is published.
